title: knautia arvensis f. ceretanica
intro: Knautia arvensis f. ceretanica, also known as the field scabious, is a plant species in the honeysuckle family that is native to the western Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Knautia arvensis f. ceretanica include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be taken internally to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
